programme.title: Song of the Gringo
programme.desc: Several miners are killed and their mines are confiscated by a mysterious person Tex an undercover cop is asked to investigate the murders However Tex ends up being implicated as a criminal

programme.title: 3 10 to Yuma
programme.desc: 3 10 to Yuma

programme.title: Phantom Rancher
programme.desc: Cowboy puts on a black mask and a black outfit to fight a gang of land-grabbing crooks

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: fter work Joe Friday goes by a laundromat to buy cigarettes He interrupts a burglar stealing from the coin box and shots are fired The burglar dies and Friday is investigated by the shooting board to see if it is a justified shot

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man is forcing different young women to help him rob banks and Friday and Gannon have to find out who he is and stop him

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Dr Kimble returns to his hometown where he reunites with his father John and his loving sister Donna who absolutely believe in his innocence but Kimbles brother Ray has serious doubts about him

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: The US Coast Guard enlists Mikes help in determining the cause of sabotage to the radar of the coastal warning system

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike Nelson decides to teach two shark-killing juvenile delinquents a lesson - in catching a live shark

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: A reporter on the airbase is bent on trying to prove that one of Gen Savages gunners is an escaped convicted murderer

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: After a visit to Tony Julia drops in on Joe and Maggie seeking a way to find Sarah whom she eventually stumbles upon at the family crypt

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Julias mental meltdown begins with hallucinations at the Collins Crypt and escalates throughout an evening alone at Collinwood

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: After ensuring Julias mind is suitably diminishing Barnabas sends Carolyn to steal the notebook from Tony

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Carolyn tries to convince Tony that Julia is a blackmailer Meanwhile David returns from Boston and encounters Sarah

programme.title: Snake In The Eagles Shadow
programme.desc: Snake In The Eagles Shadow

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A groom to be gets a lesson in monogamy from the stripper from hell at his bachelor party and then his bride is overwhelmed with suspicion and mistrust and busts married men who cheat due to having caught her father step-out on mom when she was a child

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A cop learns that an illustrator of Tales from the Crypt might have the power to make his monstrous creations come to life due to his shrewish wife

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Enoch the two-faced man an attraction at a sideshow falls in love with a 4000 year old mummy eventually leading up to the conception of their bastard child The Crypt Keeper

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: The various unlucky owners of a strange bag of cocaine are followed over the course of a night

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Successful romance novelist Claudia returns to her small hometown of Bolton to attend her high school reunion Claudia gets involved in a steamy affair with handsome young resident stud Lance However trouble materializes in the form of jealous and sinister ex-boyfriend turned local sheriff Lee

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric is kidnapped by a corrupt Southern politician who is dying of cancer and wants Eric to cure him and make him immortal by turning him into a werewolf

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric is stranded by a thunderstorm in an isolated log lodge with six other people who are being killed off one by one

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A pop radio psychiatrist is horrified because one of her call-in listeners commits murder while she is on the air and Nick helps her get her confidence back

programme.title: Friday the 13Th The Series
programme.desc: A girl finds a compact mirror that has the power to make others adore her and uses the cursed object to seek revenge against her sister

programme.title: The Return
programme.desc: In New Mexico an alien spacecraft abducts two young children and an old man 25 years later the children are returned as adults to the same town now beset by strange cattle mutilations

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter asks Gomer to take his place on a date

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carters adopted Korean daughter arrives-but shes not the little girl he remembers

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A lost crate containing a top-secret clay that can be converted to explosives washes up on the island Not knowing what it is they make several items with it--including Gilligans new tooth fillings

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The pilot episode that tells the tale of a tiny ship which set off on a three-hour tour but got caught in a storm and beached on an island The pilot was filmed in November 1963 and not aired until almost 30 years later

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa is upset to learn that Little Luke wants to grow up to be a scientist rather than continuing farming in the MCcoy tradition

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Both Grampa and his best friend George have their caps set on the new librarian

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear S03E06
programme.desc: BJ and the Bear S03E06

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Both Carol and Ed want Wilbur to hire a famous decorator to redo the house and stable in a Hawaiian Modern motif

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur bets an old college rival 5 bills that Ed can out-jump his horse He has second thoughts after he realizes that 5 bills equals 500

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: With camp security raised Hogan and his men are desperate to smuggle some top-secret plans of German fortifications to the Allies The solution Make liberal use of Carters remarkable impersonation of Adolf Hitler

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: The aristocratic Colonel Klink fails a routine physical exam and lands a combat assignment at the Russian front! Fearing a hard-line replacement at Stalag 13 the men must do all they can to rescind Klinks marching papers

programme.title: Mchale 232
programme.desc: Mchale 232

programme.title: Mchale 305
programme.desc: Mchale 305

programme.title: The Flight Of The Phoenix
programme.desc: After an oil company plane crashes in the Sahara the survivors are buoyed with hope by one of the passengers an airplane designer who plans for them to build a flyable plane from the wreckage

programme.title: Mozambique 1964
programme.desc: An out-of-work and penniless American pilot is offered work in Mozambique and promptly becomes an unwitting pawn in a world of drug smuggling kidnap and murder

programme.title: Genghis Khan
programme.desc: During the thirteenth century the shy Mongol boy Temujin Carlo Cura becomes the fearless leader Genghis Khan Omar Sharif who unites all Mongol tribes and conquers most of Asia Europe and the Middle East

programme.title: Morning Departure
programme.desc: Trouble arises when 12 men realize that only eight of them can escape from the sinking submarine that has collided with a mine left over from the war

programme.title: Dark Night of the Scarecrow
programme.desc: In a small Southern town four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man but after the court sets them free mysterious accidents begin to kill them off one by one

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke get jobs hauling wrecked cars to demolition derby operator Augie Detweiller unaware he and Boss have schemed to hide stolen engines under the hood When they are suspected of smuggling the stolen engines into Hazzard Bo agrees to become a driver in an upcoming event to find out the truth

programme.title: Hercules 204
programme.desc: Hercules 204

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Lili Vorjak and the baby flee to find a shuttle to escape Earth Liam and Sandoval are both tracking them - for different reasons Augur is on the run from volunteers but sends a friend Juliet to help Liam while hes gone

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Many centuries ago one alien ship crashed on earth The surviving aliens were defeated by a local Indian tribe The modern day aliens attempt to acquire the ship to assist in their subjugation of the planet

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Two of Tressas friends are trapped in an invisible stealth shield developed by Dr Arcane

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: After investigating a planet where all humanoid life had been eradicated Koenig becomes trapped in a prison on one of the moons where no one knows that their planet has been wiped out

programme.title: City of the Living Dead
programme.desc: A psychic and a journalist head to Dunvich to prevent an apocalypse after a priest commits suicide in a cemetery somehow causing the gates of hell to open and allowing the dead to rise

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne comes to the aid of a woman but finds she has double-crossed him He tracks her down finding her a owner of a herd of cattle being driven to Kansas He joins drive as a hand but his expertise may bring him a big payday

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: Sanfran 417
programme.desc: Sanfran 417

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: When the IMFs original scheme to free an elderly cardinal from an inescapable prison in a fictional Eastern European country goes awry the team must concoct a new plan to get him out of solitary confinement

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An old Vaudevillian finds 9 one thousand dollar bills on the street He uses one to buy his friends drinks at a dive The next morning a private detective claims that the money was lost by a big time gambler and pressures him to give it back he does and discovers that the detective was a con man

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: When a man is arrested for possession of illegal pills he provides information that may help him at trial The information leads Friday and Gannon to a home used as a pill making factory and the detectives must try to locate the man running the factory

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: After being mugged by four hoodlums Kimble is reluctant to deal with the police But while leaving town he ends up getting handcuffed to a policewoman When she breaks her ankle Kimble has to help her while evading the police manhunt

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: The arrival of an old friend of Victoria and Toms causes trouble in the Valley due to the mans claim on a plot of land which has been earmarked as the location of a new dam

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: Silent Rage
programme.desc: When Sheriff Dan kills a man with a mental illness a team of doctors resuscitates him and makes him invincible Terror fills the town as the revived man sets off on a killing spree

programme.title: Convoy
programme.desc: Truckers form a mile-long convoy in support of a truckers vendetta with an abusive sheriff - Based on the country song of the same title by CW McCall

programme.title: Battletruck

programme.title: The Flight Of The Phoenix
programme.desc: After an oil company plane crashes in the Sahara the survivors are buoyed with hope by one of the passengers an airplane designer who plans for them to build a flyable plane from the wreckage

programme.desc: A troubled young man is drawn to a mythical place called Midian where a variety of friendly monsters are hiding from humanity Meanwhile a sadistic serial killer is looking for a patsy

programme.desc: Two lovers stumble across a small American town where local children have killed the adult population in a bizarre ritual

programme.title: Demons 2
programme.desc: Various residents of a high-rise apartment building are watching a film being broadcast on television The films story follows several teens who trespass into a city that was deserted and walled-off due to the Demon outbreak from the first film Finding the demons corpse one of the teens revives it accidentally when blood drips from a scratch into the demons mouth

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: An unconquered planet in the midst of Monster Minds intrigues the Lightning League and they go to investigate Upon crash landing they discover the energy of the Pride and the vehicles and their own energy is being drained

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss offers a huge reward to pirates and cut-throats if they will deliver Jayce to him A pirate scratches Herc with his special ring which causes Herc to become evil and start plotting against Jayce Jayce must take the Pride to Planet Hippo

programme.desc: Giant caterpillars appear in the Central American Jungle By clearing a path they reveal a map to the temple of an ancient Malacca civilization

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain sets a trap by showing the N team she is defeated and also opens up a warp zone with Kevins neighborhood shown on the other side Foolishly Kevin goes through and the members of his team are captured and banished to the Black Hole Warp Zone Kevin realizes hes actually on Metroid Then he succeeds into getting back to the Palace and rescuing the N team

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: On his birthday Mega Man really wishes to become human So he is ready to pass the Three Challenges to accomplish humanity

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap
